ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这是一个空操作，但可能表明你的应用存在 bug。请改为直接赋值给 `this.state`，或在 %s 组件中定义 `state = {};` 类属性并设置所需状态。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Received an unexpected object in getComponentNameFromType(). This is likely a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 在 getComponentNameFromType() 中收到意外的对象。这很可能是 React 的一个 bug。请提交问题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `key` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://react.dev/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s：`key` 不是一个 prop。尝试访问它会返回 `undefined`。如果你需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应当通过不同的 prop 传递它。（https://react.dev/link/special-props）

ast.name: error
ast.source:
lazy: Expected the result of a dynamic import() call. Instead received: %s

Your code should look like: 
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

Did you accidentally put curly braces around the import?
ast.target:
lazy：期望得到动态 import() 调用的结果，但收到的是：%s

你的代码应如下所示：
  const MyComponent = lazy(() => import('./MyComponent'))

你是否不小心在 import 外面加了花括号？

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: You called act(async () => ...) without await. This could lead to unexpected testing behaviour, interleaving multiple act calls and mixing their scopes. You should - await act(async () => ...);
ast.target: 你在未使用 await 的情况下调用了 act(async () => ...)。这可能导致意外的测试行为，多个 act 调用交错并混淆其作用域。你应该这样做——await act(async () => ...);

ast.name: error
ast.source:
A component suspended inside an `act` scope, but the `act` call was not awaited. When testing React components that depend on asynchronous data, you must await the result:

await act(() => ...)
ast.target:
一个组件在 `act` 作用域内挂起，但 `act` 调用未被 await。测试依赖异步数据的 React 组件时，你必须等待结果：

await act(() => ...)

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef requires a render function but was given %s.
ast.target: forwardRef 需要一个 render 函数，但传入的是 %s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions accept exactly two parameters: props and ref. %s
ast.target: forwardRef 的 render 函数只接受两个参数：props 和 ref。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions do not support defaultProps. Did you accidentally pass a React component?
ast.target: forwardRef 的 render 函数不支持 defaultProps。你是否不小心传入了一个 React 组件？

ast.name: error
ast.source: We expected inner Transitions to have transferred the outer types set and that you cannot add to the outer Transition while inside the inner.This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 我们期望内部 Transition 已转移外部类型集合，并且在内部时不能向外部 Transition 添加。这是 React 的一个 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Calling useContext(Context.Consumer) is not supported and will cause bugs. Did you mean to call useContext(Context) instead?
ast.target: 不支持调用 useContext(Context.Consumer)，这会导致错误。你是想改为调用 useContext(Context) 吗？

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
You are using import attributes, without specifying the desired output syntax.
Please specify the "importAttributesKeyword" generator option, whose value can be one of:
 - "with"        : `import { a } from "b" with { type: "json" };`
 - "assert"      : `import { a } from "b" assert { type: "json" };`
 - "with-legacy" : `import { a } from "b" with type: "json";`
ast.target:
你正在使用 import attributes，但未指定所需的输出语法。
请指定 "importAttributesKeyword" 生成器选项，其值可以是以下之一：
 - "with"        : `import { a } from "b" with { type: "json" };`
 - "assert"      : `import { a } from "b" assert { type: "json" };`
 - "with-legacy" : `import { a } from "b" with type: "json";`

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning, the following targets are using a decimal version:
ast.target: 警告，以下目标正在使用小数版本：

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
We recommend using a string for minor/patch versions to avoid numbers like 6.10
getting parsed as 6.1, which can lead to unexpected behavior.
ast.target: 我们建议对次版本/补丁版本使用字符串，以避免像 6.10 这样的数字被解析为 6.1，从而导致意外行为。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @babel/helpers is outdated, update it to silence this warning.
ast.target: @babel/helpers 已过时，更新它以消除此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The smart-mix pipe operator is deprecated. Use "proposal": "hack" instead.
ast.target: smart-mix 管道运算符已弃用。请改用 "proposal": "hack"。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
WARNING (@babel/preset-env): We noticed you're using the `useBuiltIns` option without declaring a core-js version. Currently, we assume version 2.x when no version is passed. Since this default version will likely change in future versions of Babel, we recommend explicitly setting the core-js version you are using via the `corejs` option.

You should also be sure that the version you pass to the `corejs` option matches the version specified in your `package.json`'s `dependencies` section. If it doesn't, you need to run one of the following commands:

  npm install --save core-js@2    npm install --save core-js@3
  yarn add core-js@2              yarn add core-js@3

More info about useBuiltIns: https://babeljs.io/docs/en/babel-preset-env#usebuiltins
More info about core-js: https://babeljs.io/docs/en/babel-preset-env#corejs
ast.target:
WARNING (@babel/preset-env): 我们注意到你在未声明 core-js 版本的情况下使用了 `useBuiltIns` 选项。当前，如果未传入版本，我们会假定为 2.x。由于这个默认版本很可能在 Babel 的未来版本中发生变化，我们建议你通过 `corejs` 选项明确设置正在使用的 core-js 版本。

你还应确保传给 `corejs` 选项的版本与 `package.json` 的 `dependencies` 部分中指定的版本一致。如果不一致，你需要运行以下命令之一：

  npm install --save core-js@2    npm install --save core-js@3
  yarn add core-js@2              yarn add core-js@3

关于 useBuiltIns 的更多信息: https://babeljs.io/docs/en/babel-preset-env#usebuiltins
关于 core-js 的更多信息: https://babeljs.io/docs/en/babel-preset-env#corejs

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING (@babel/preset-env): The `corejs` option only has an effect when the `useBuiltIns` option is not `false`
ast.target: WARNING (@babel/preset-env): 只有当 `useBuiltIns` 选项不是 `false` 时，`corejs` 选项才会生效
